reviews.comment:
Soy un cliente de YPF , ayer fui a cargar infinita diesel (sabiendo el problema de falta )
Al ver que estaban cargando me puse en fila y cuando tocó mi turno me dicen que sólo vendían a cuentas corrientes y bonos .
ME SENTÍ UN BÓLUDO YA QUE SIEMPRE CARGUE EN YPF , SOY SOCIO DEL A.C.A. , UTILIZO LA APLICACIÓN  APP. DE YPF , DESAYUNO TODAS LAS MAÑANAS EN LA FULL .
TOTALMENTE INDIGNADO DESCARGUE LA APP . SHELL . YPF TERMINO PARA MI .

(Translated by Google)
I'm a YPF customer, and yesterday I went to fill up with Infinita Diesel (knowing about the shortage). When I saw they were filling up, I got in line, and when it was my turn, they told me they were only selling to checking accounts and bondholders.
I felt like a fool since I always fill up at YPF, I'm a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), I use the YPF app, and I have breakfast at the Full service station every morning.
Completely outraged, I downloaded the Shell app. YPF is finished for me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPcmN6VkhREAE

reviews.comment:
La verdad creo que cuando uno va a cargar combustible hay una estación de servicio el cual al echar el combustible gatillan infinidades de veces y creo que es allí donde roban el cual está en cercanía de YPF mientras lo charlan a uno una vez reclame y se enojo el playero digan lo que digan están robando pero en la YPF y en la ESSO y la Shell no y esto deben tener cuidado porque por lo menos a mi en varias oportunidades el combustible no me rindió para nada no se si los dueños saben pero solo es cuestión de observar y tener un poquito de lógica por eso no compro más en esa estación de servicio que está por la Sánchez Oviedo

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, I think that when you go to fill up, there's a gas station where they press the pump countless times while you're pumping, and I think that's where they steal. It's near a YPF station, and while they're talking to you, the attendant got angry once when I complained. Say what you will, they're stealing, but not at YPF, Esso, or Shell. And you should be careful because, at least for me, on several occasions, the fuel didn't last me nearly as long. I don't know if the owners know, but it's just a matter of observing and using a little common sense. That's why I don't buy gas at that station on Sánchez Oviedo anymore.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQydUllQ3dBRRAB
